textByHashes.7d7814e5286eef565b5a6ee5dd29e224c3e4b721: I'm sorry, but I can't really help you right now. Perhaps you should ask me again later, or try a different camel.
textByHashes.c07bced09b02baeb2689815708b062d6dd5f6ee4: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!
textByHashes.68357b5792c5ae00fee22c5c8a2c6e925b46fd55: I hope that's what you wanted!
textByHashes.cb51e31bdb319dc9aec9bf34443dbb86260ba058: Well, don't interrupt me, I've got work to do.
textByHashes.992f93c56d6df9c00ccb5c6b2f210c9b04bfb6d6: I'm participating in the construction of a shopping and sales extravaganza!
textByHashes.2b8a5ca2f07dfa48f0e5fa74294179fb3d65db67: My masters have me hauling boxes around. There's not much to do at the moment, though.
textByHashes.dd600ef79b3f90be593f94777e3674eaa392183a: Yes, that's them. They're traders working for Ali Morrisane.
textByHashes.afce64f86c54c9b1d2231c13b17a9129a887dc9c: It's hard work sometimes, but it could be worse.
textByHashes.c4d09adedea89c4f13243752eefd098d277a94ed: I heard about a pair of camels back in Pollnivneach who were poisoned!
textByHashes.23530088bd3aa1aa823f8b0a6668a2a760e04b90: They say someone put spicy sauce in their food.
textByHashes.9f0608eb901182812ab7477ea3c1115fa177a6ee: I sincerely hope whoever did it was punished. Do they have no compassion for camels?
